title: katherinea macropoda
intro: Katherinea macropoda, also known as the 'Queen of the Andes', is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues. Katherinea macropoda can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
